Petition For Preliminary Distribution; Petition For Approval Of Distribution Of Pecuniary Gifts; And Petition For Partial Payment Of Executor'S And Attorneys' Fees For Ordinary Services
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for the Executors.

Mr. Siracusa stated that the supplement regarding notice had been filed. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3362 Jackson Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Michael Santimauro.

The Court stated that the matter was procedurally in order. The sale was confirmed at $2,500,000.00. No bond was required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3560 Palomar Way Napa, Ca.)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Petitioners.

The sale was confirmed at $172,500.00 for 50% interest of the property. Bond is waived. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3619 Beckworth Drive Napa, Ca 94558)
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that the petition was procedurally in order. The sale was confirmed at $370,000.00, (order for the same signed in open court). Bond was waived.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.
